notes: Three search piles at the courthouse: the plaintiff's table (Anna's brief, highlighter, exhibits), the defense table (the binder Tessier's counsel left at the rail), the bench (the gavel and the minute order).

the_avant_brief.label: Anna's brief in opposition
the_avant_brief.flavor: Twenty-two pages. Highlighted. Tabbed. The footnote on page nine was added at midnight Tuesday.

exhibit_b_survey.label: Exhibit B — 1974 survey
exhibit_b_survey.flavor: Mylar copy of the original lot survey. The setback line is in red pencil.

exhibit_d_geotech.label: Exhibit D — geotechnical report
exhibit_d_geotech.flavor: Eighty pages. The conclusion is on page fourteen, third paragraph from the bottom.

tessiers_binder.label: Tessier's binder (unmarked)
tessiers_binder.flavor: Black leather. Embossed initials on the spine: HB. Tessier's counsel keeps it unmarked because Tessier's counsel does not, in court, telegraph.

the_motion_packet.label: The motion packet
the_motion_packet.flavor: Defense's papers. Page eleven is the page Erica spent the most time on. Page twelve is the page Tessier wanted her on.

the_california_caselaw.label: Caselaw from California
the_california_caselaw.flavor: Defense filed a Ninth Circuit case from 2014 they think they can cite by analogy. It is not, in this jurisdiction, particularly good law.

the_gavel.label: The gavel
the_gavel.flavor: Walnut. The handle has been worn dark on the right side by Erica's hand. She uses it twice a docket — once to call court to order, once to set a matter under submission.

the_minute_order_pad.label: The minute order pad
the_minute_order_pad.flavor: Carbon. Erica writes the ruling on the top sheet; the carbon goes to the clerk; the original goes to chambers. Anna will see the carbon on her way out.

the_chambers_coffee_mug.label: The chambers coffee mug
the_chambers_coffee_mug.flavor: Pewter. Anna gave it to Erica at graduation, 2000. Erica still uses it on the bench. The handle is on the side facing Anna's table.
